summary: Completed comprehensive regression testing after major refactoring. Server.py was split into modular files (database.py, auth.py, models.py, routes/*). All 34 backend API tests passed. Frontend verification shows all critical features working: Homepage, Hosting Guide page, Auth, Profile with Partners tab, Admin with Newsletter/Analytics tabs, Post page with like/share buttons.

issues: Console warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - minor HTML validation warning in Digest Performance History table. Functionality not affected.

passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - valid credentials returns 200 with token - PASS
GET /api/categories - returns list of approved categories - PASS
GET /api/categories/social-media - returns category with posts - PASS
POST /api/posts - create post as user - PASS
GET /api/admin/stats - returns stats for admin - PASS
UI: Homepage loads with posts and categories - PASS
UI: Hosting Guide page (/hosting-guide) loads with 6 deployment steps - PASS
UI: Login form works and redirects to homepage - PASS
UI: Profile page shows 3 tabs (My Posts, Interactions, Partners) - PASS
UI: Partners tab shows Find Partners search and My Partners section - PASS
UI: Admin page shows 6 tabs (Overview, Moderation, Newsletter, Analytics, Recent Posts/Comments, Users) - PASS
UI: Admin Newsletter tab shows Weekly Digest Management with Send Digest Now button - PASS
UI: Admin Analytics tab shows Open Rate, Click Rate, and Digest Performance History table - PASS
UI: Post page shows like button and share section - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring was done well - server.py reduced from 1500+ lines to ~140 lines as an orchestrator
All route modules properly separated: auth, posts, categories, comments, admin, newsletter, partners, profile, upload, tracking, misc
Auth helpers (hash_password, verify_password, create_token, get_current_user, require_user, require_admin) properly modularized in auth.py
Minor: Admin Analytics table has HTML validation warning - consider wrapping table rows differently
seed_data_creation: One TEST_Regression_Post created during pytest run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major refactoring completed and verified. Server.py now imports routes from /routes/ directory. Key modules: database.py (MongoDB connection), auth.py (JWT auth helpers), models.py (Pydantic models), seed_data.py (seed categories/posts), websocket_manager.py, email_service.py. Route modules: auth.py, posts.py, categories.py, comments.py, admin.py, newsletter.py, partners.py, profile.py, upload.py, tracking.py, misc.py. New HostingGuidePage added at /hosting-guide. All previous tests from iteration_9 functionality still working.

modules_verified: routes/posts.py - GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/posts, like toggle, liked status, related posts, popular list
frontend_pages_verified: ProfilePage - My Posts, Interactions, Partners tabs
AdminPage - Overview, Moderation, Newsletter, Analytics, Recent Posts/Comments, Users tabs
PostPage - content, like button, share section, comments, related posts
